footer.tagline: Building open, ethical language infrastructure for Africa and the Global South. Ensuring no community is left behind in the intelligence era.
home.hero.headline: AI for Every Language. Data Sovereignty. Open Science.
home.hero.subheadline: Building language technology for 2,000+ African languages. Open infrastructure. Community-led. Forever free.
about.page_subtitle: We believe the future of AI should include every voice, every language, and every community across the African continent — not as an afterthought, but as a founding principle.
programs.page_subtitle: Our programs span the full lifecycle of language technology — from foundational research to community deployment, from policy advocacy to talent development.
technology.page_subtitle: Language technology should be a public good. All our models, datasets, and tools are freely available to researchers and developers worldwide — no paywalls, no lock-in.
impact.page_subtitle: We measure success not in papers published, but in communities empowered, languages preserved, and barriers broken across 18 African countries.
insights.page_subtitle: Explore our publications, field stories, and policy briefs shaping the future of African language technology — from lab to community.
get_involved.page_subtitle: Researchers, developers, community members, and organisations — there is a place for you.
donate.page_subtitle: Your donation directly funds the digitization of African languages, the development of open-source AI models, and the empowerment of communities across the continent.
bounties.page_subtitle: Specific, transparent, and community-accountable. Each bounty is a real data deficit with a funding target. Every dollar moves directly to local voice collectors, transcribers, and annotators.
vitality.page_subtitle: AI-readiness audit for African languages. Track corpus depth, model coverage, and community deployment.
manifesto.page_subtitle: A founding statement on language equity, digital sovereignty, and the responsibility of those who build machines that think.
status.page_subtitle: All LocaleNLP Foundation services are monitored 24/7.
ethics.page_subtitle: We don't just write policies. We enforce ethical data collection at the API level. Cryptographically secure, community-owned, and globally compliant.
lang.switcher.label: Language / Langue / Lugha
lang.switcher.note: Visual language selector — site content remains in English.
form.name: Full Name
nav.about.manifesto_desc: Our founding statement on language equity
nav.programs.openspeech_desc: Open speech data for 200+ African languages
nav.programs.policy_desc: Embedding language equity in AI policy
nav.technology.api_desc: Try live API calls — no signup required

nav.get_involved.volunteer_desc: Contribute voice data, earn via mobile money
nav.get_involved.contact_desc: Get in touch with our team
hero.label: DIGITAL SOVEREIGNTY
hero.subheadline: We are building the language technology that will give over 2,000 African languages a voice in the AI revolution. Because digital sovereignty starts with your mother tongue.
form.error_retry: Something went wrong — please try again.
form.success_body: You'll receive an SMS from Lughatna within 24 hours with your first prompt in {language}.
form.privacy_note: We only use your number to send contribution prompts. No spam, no selling data.
persona.researcher.label: As a Researcher
persona.researcher.title: AIxLanguage Fellowship
persona.researcher.desc: A fully-funded 12-month program for African researchers and engineers to specialize in NLP and language AI. Work alongside leading practitioners, publish open research, and receive career support after the fellowship.
persona.researcher.benefit4: Network access and direct job placement
persona.developer.label: As a Developer
persona.developer.title: Open Source Contributor
persona.developer.desc: Help build the next generation of African language models. All skill levels are welcome — from first-time open-source contributors to experienced ML engineers. Work on meaningful problems with real-world deployment.
persona.developer.benefit2: Learn from domain experts and researchers
persona.developer.benefit3: Build a portfolio of production-level work
persona.community.label: As a Community Member
persona.community.title: Community Data Contributor
persona.community.desc: Help preserve your language by contributing speech and text data. No technical skills required — just your voice and knowledge. Contributors are compensated fairly and retain moral rights over their linguistic heritage.
persona.community.benefit3: Preserve your language for future generations
persona.partner.label: As a Partner
persona.partner.title: Partner With Us
persona.partner.desc: Join our network of research institutions, governments, and civil-society organizations building language technology across Africa. Access our open APIs, co-publish research, and deliver measurable impact in your target communities.
persona.partner.benefit1: Full access to open models and APIs
supporter.label: IMPACT PORTFOLIO
supporter.title: Your Investment,
supporter.subtitle: Every dollar you commit is tracked, allocated, and reported in real time.
supporter.preview_note: This is a preview of the Sustaining Supporter experience. Activate your dashboard by making a recurring donation.
involved.subtitle: Lughatna connects native speakers across Africa with researchers and institutions who need their knowledge. Contribute voice data, translations, and annotations — and get paid instantly via mobile money, while preserving your language for generations.
involved.how_title: Three steps to your first payout
involved.how_body: No technical skills required — just your voice, your language, and ten minutes.
involved.form_body: Enter your number and native language. We'll send you a prompt via SMS — no app download required. Your first session takes under 10 minutes and earns you an instant mobile money transfer upon consensus.
involved.feature_flexible_body: Contribute whenever suits you — no shifts, no minimums.
involved.feature_payment_body: M-Pesa, Wave, or Orange Money paid on consensus.
involved.feature_ownership_body: You retain moral rights over your linguistic contribution.
involved.pathways_body: From technical contributions to community data collection — select your role to see how you can make an impact.
involved.contact_body: Ready to get involved or have questions about our programs? Our team responds within 48 hours. Fill out the form or reach us directly at the addresses below.
bounty.no_match_hint: Try selecting a different category above.
donate.bounty_subtitle_suffix: Every dollar goes directly to the community voice collectors, transcribers, and annotators working on this language.
donate.one_time_body: A single contribution triggers real infrastructure — transcription hours, compute cycles, and linguist stipends begin the moment your payment clears.
donate.secure_note: 🔒 256-bit encrypted via Stripe · 501(c)(3) verified · No account required
donate.monthly_body: Monthly donors are the backbone of long-term language preservation. Select your tier and see the exact outcome your recurring contribution creates.
donate.use_of_funds_body: Cryptographically secure, community-owned, and globally compliant. Here is exactly how every dollar is allocated.
donate.nonprofit_body: 501(c)(3) registered. All donations are tax-deductible in the United States.
donate.institutional_body: For foundations, corporations, and governments looking to make a transformative, long-term commitment to African language equity.
donate.tier_supporter_desc: Digitizes one full hour of endangered speech — a dialect preserved for every generation that follows.
donate.tier_sustainer_desc: Funds a full week of community data collection — linguists paid, gear deployed, data returned to the community.
donate.tier_partner_desc: Sponsors an entire language for a month — from community mobilisation to dataset release under an open licence.
donate.tier_supporter_f1: Named in our community supporters list
donate.tier_partner_f4: Direct line to our research team
donate.inst_sponsor_desc: Fund the complete digitization of a specific African language — from community engagement to model deployment.
donate.inst_fellow_desc: Support an African researcher through our 12-month AIxLanguage Fellowship programme.
donate.inst_multi_desc: Partner with us on a multi-year grant to support long-term research and community programs.
nav.support.label: SUPPORT OUR MISSION
